{{Infobox character
| name = Rebel Queen of Karosha
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Knight (novel)|The Knight]]
}}

== The Knight ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The narrator has allied themselves with the [[Rebel Queen of Karosha]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c14">''The Knight'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Rebel Queen of Karosha]] is mentioned by [[Benri]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c21">''The Knight'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Raion]]'s crew took up with the [[Rebel Queen of Karosha]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c26">''The Knight'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
